nodes.label: graphify (mandated HTML-dev tool)
nodes.rationale: User directive: all subsequent HTML/terminal development must use graphify; implementor must confirm what graphify actually is before applying it to production files.

nodes.label: TradeBoxes custom lightweight-charts primitive
nodes.rationale: TradingView-style position-box visualization: canvas primitive drawing green (entry->TP) and red (entry->SL) zones spanning entry->exit, with entry/TP/SL lines and LONG/SHORT arrow + return% label.

nodes.label: Circuit breaker (DD>=15% or 6-loss-streak halt)
nodes.rationale: Single-extreme-point risk gate: halts trading when drawdown from peak >=15% (max_dd_pct) OR losing streak >=6 (max_loss_streak); trips flatten position + live=false + halted=true + WA alert. Only trips when live=true.

nodes.label: Statistical tripwire (rolling-metric risk gate)
nodes.rationale: More sensitive than circuit-breaker: reacts to shape of rolling distribution (rolling-41 WR floor 46.3%, rolling-41 compounded return floor -4.7%, rolling-30 short-only WR floor 46.7%, DD ceiling 11.1%) derived from 558-trade python replay + cross-checked against 733-trade TradingView export. 2-tier: 1 breach -> size_mult=0.5; >=2 breaches simultaneously -> full pause, same effect as circuit-breaker but tripped earlier.

nodes.label: Paper/Live + Testnet/Mainnet dual switch
nodes.rationale: Two independent toggles (live true/false, net testnet/mainnet) combine into safe defaults: live=false=paper (no orders anywhere); live=true&net=testnet=real orders on fake money; live=true&net=mainnet=real money with red-badge UI confirm. Keys are per-net in bot_secrets.json; signal/data always from mainnet, only execution routes to selected net.

nodes.label: Asset adapter pattern (1 adapter per asset class -> uniform OHLCV)
nodes.rationale: Chart/indicator/news structure is asset-agnostic; adding a new asset (e.g. stocks) only requires a new backend adapter that normalizes to {time,open,high,low,close,volume} format so the frontend never needs to change.
nodes.norm_label: asset adapter pattern (1 adapter per asset class -> uniform ohlcv)

nodes.label: v20 strategy (RSI-momentum breakout + pullback + regime-TP)
nodes.rationale: Only computed on 15m timeframe; validated at 557 trades WR64.27%/+3327% (later refined to 558 trades/+3360.8%/DD10.97/WR64.34/Calmar306.3 with macro-event SL widening). Sole live-executed sleeve after funding/CVD sleeves were removed.

nodes.label: Bloomberg-terminal CSS-variable theming system
nodes.rationale: All colors/fonts flow through CSS custom properties at :root (--bg,--panel,--ink,--amber,--mono,--disp etc) so retheming only requires changing variables, not markup.
